title: Repo Local Self Improvement Skill 2026 04 26
goal: Resolve #379 by adding a repo-local, non-shipped self-improvement dogfooding skill.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: Repo-local skill guidance exists for bounded system-intent-driven dogfooding loops.
intent.constraints: Do not create shipped package workflow, new authority over system intent, or an infinite autopilot loop.
intent.latitude: Place the skill in repo-owned tool skills and register it so package skill discovery can recommend it.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.next_step: Create the smallest repo-local non-shipped self-improvement skill using existing package surfaces.
execution.proof: Run skills query, proof-selected workspace CLI tests, and root ruff.

invariants: Package commands remain the operating path.
Human-owned product direction and system intent remain authoritative.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Let this repo dogfood the package through bounded improvement loops without adding shipped workflow machinery.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: agentic-workspace skills can now discover and recommend a repo-local self-improvement-dogfooding skill for repeat/autopilot dogfooding prompts.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: skills query recommends the new skill; workspace CLI tests and ruff passed.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: refresh planning; no tracked open issue remains after #379 closes.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep it non-shipped, bounded, non-authoritative, and stop-trigger driven.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact repo-owned skill placement and wording, provided package commands are the normal operating path.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger intended outcome separately from this bounded slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep the slice bounded while carrying any larger follow-on through explicit continuation fields.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

active_milestone.scope: Repo-owned skill file, tool skill registry, and README listing.

immediate_next_action: Create the smallest repo-local non-shipped self-improvement skill using existing package surfaces.
invariants: Package commands remain the operating path.
Human-owned product direction and system intent remain authoritative.
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "repeat system-intent-driven dogfooding improvement" --format json
uv run ruff check src tests
completion_criteria: Repo-local guidance exists with loop shape, stop triggers, evidence requirements, friction routing, and anti-overfitting boundaries.

proof_report.proof achieved now: The skills command discovers and recommends self-improvement-dogfooding for repeat system-intent dogfooding prompts; workspace CLI tests and root ruff passed.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "repeat system-intent-driven dogfooding improvement" --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Repo-owned self-improvement dogfooding skill added and registered.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "repeat system-intent-driven dogfooding improvement" --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests
execution_summary.resume from: refresh planning state; no tracked open issue remains after #379 closeout

discard.summary: No additional shipped package feature is needed for #379.

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Promoted from TODO direct-task shape into an execplan.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #379 is closed; repo-local self-improvement-dogfooding skill exists, is registered, and is recommended by agentic-workspace skills.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The requested repo-local non-shipped guidance artifact is complete and bounded.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen if the skill is no longer discoverable or starts acting as shipped package authority.
